emails.subject: FW: Rehearing on PG&E's GRC
emails.body: FW: Rehearing on PG&E's GRC Vindication two years late.

emails.subject: Re: FW: Rehearing on PG&E's GRC
emails.body: Re: FW: Rehearing on PG&E's GRC Congrats! There are more successes to come..I have some add'l. Thoughts on your future role ..let's discuss tommorrow. Rick S.

emails.subject: RE: FW: Rehearing on PG&E's GRC
emails.body: RE: FW: Rehearing on PG&E's GRC Thanks, Rick. I received your voicemail as well. I am around (SF) all day tomorrow and look forward to discussing your thoughts. Thanks for your kind words today. I will continue to seriously contemplate my decision.

emails.subject: RE: FW: Rehearing on PG&E's GRC
emails.body: RE: FW: Rehearing on PG&E's GRC Thanks, Rick. I received your voicemail as well. I am around (SF) all day tomorrow and look forward to discussing your thoughts. Thanks for your kind words today. I will continue to seriously contemplate my decision.
